method: COMMENT_EVALUATION — D2 pointer 147 (DIM-073-SD001). The guilt->repentance->no-condemnation->justification->salvation soteriology arc is NOT covered in M38 (its sequence findings are within-characteristic faith->healing). It is a cross-cluster synthesis with no M38 tier home -> an OBSERVATIONAL finding (cluster_observation). M38 (Salvation) is its terminus/home. Pointer 147 then resolved.

new_observations.title: Inner-being soteriology arc — salvation as terminus of guilt → repentance → no-condemnation → justification
new_observations.description: Salvation (M38) is the terminus of a discernible inner-being soteriology arc spanning four registries/clusters: guilt-incurred (R073 -> M10 Sin/Guilt) -> repentance (R135 -> M11 Repentance/Forgiveness) -> freedom from condemnation (R024, Rom 8:1) -> justification (R098 -> M26 Righteousness/Justice, Rom 5:1,9) -> salvation received (M38). The trajectory is the inner-being ordo salutis: conviction of guilt registers the need (cf. Act 16:30, an M38-A enabling condition), repentance turns the will (Act 2:38), the verdict shifts from condemnation to no-condemnation, justification declares the standing, and salvation is the comprehensive deliverance into which the arc resolves. Each stage lives primarily in its own cluster; M38 is where they converge as received salvation. Cross-cluster observation (not a verse-level term finding): the stages are evidenced in their own clusters; this records the arc's convergence in salvation. Adopted from DIM-073-SD001.

resolve_flags.resolved_note: Adopted into M38 as an observational finding (cluster_observation: 'Inner-being soteriology arc'). The guilt->repentance->no-condemnation->justification->salvation trajectory converges in M38 (Salvation); constituent stages cross-referenced to M10/M11/M26. Pointer closed.
